description: Rebuild the admin repository, provider, and add a Supabase Storage service for image uploads. Update the SQL schema with new/missing columns. Create a storage_service.dart that uses Supabase Storage buckets for uploading tournament logos, team logos, and player photos via image_picker. Update admin_repository.dart to add missing fields (tournament_type, total_teams, total_matches, location for tournaments; captain, vice_captain, max_squad_size, min_squad_size for teams; jersey_number, age, profile_image for players; overs, time for matches; total_spots, max_teams_per_user, contest_type options for contests). Create a new SQL file sql/part4-admin-module-updates.sql with ALTER TABLE statements for any new columns. Ensure admin_payment_methods table is also in the SQL.
steps: Create lib/features/admin/data/services/storage_service.dart - A Supabase Storage upload service that: uses Supabase.instance.client.storage, has uploadImage(String bucket, String path, Uint8List bytes) method returning the public URL, supports buckets: 'tournament-logos', 'team-logos', 'player-photos'. Provider: storageServiceProvider.

Update lib/features/admin/data/repositories/admin_repository.dart - Ensure all CRUD methods handle the full field set. For createMatch: add tournament_id, team_a_id, team_b_id, date_time, overs fields. For createTournament: add tournament_type, start_date, end_date, total_teams, total_matches, location, logo fields. For createTeam: add tournament_id, captain, vice_captain, max_squad_size, min_squad_size fields. For createPlayer: add team_id, jersey_number, age, image fields. For createContest: add total_spots, max_teams_per_user, contest_type (Mega/HeadToHead/SmallLeague/WinnerTakesAll) fields. Add getTeamsByTournament(tournamentId) and getPlayersByTeam(teamId) methods. Add getMatchPlayers(matchId) and setMatchPlayers(matchId, playerIds) methods for Playing XI selection.

Update lib/features/admin/domain/providers/admin_provider.dart - Add methods: loadTeamsByTournament(tournamentId), loadPlayersByTeam(teamId), setMatchPlayers(matchId, playerIds). Keep existing pattern but ensure no provider modifications happen during widget build (the provider methods are async and called from button handlers or initState via WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback, so they are safe).

Create sql/part4-admin-module-updates.sql - Add columns: tournaments table (tournament_type TEXT, total_teams INT, total_matches INT, location TEXT); teams table (captain TEXT, vice_captain TEXT, max_squad_size INT DEFAULT 16, min_squad_size INT DEFAULT 11); players table (jersey_number INT, age INT); matches table (overs INT, time TIMESTAMPTZ); contests table (total_spots INT, max_teams_per_user INT DEFAULT 1, winning_distribution JSONB). Create admin_payment_methods table. Create Supabase storage buckets (as comments with instructions). Add match_players unique constraint on (match_id, player_id).
acceptance_criteria: storage_service.dart exists with uploadImage method and storageServiceProvider
admin_repository.dart has getTeamsByTournament, getPlayersByTeam, getMatchPlayers, setMatchPlayers methods
admin_provider.dart has loadTeamsByTournament, loadPlayersByTeam, setMatchPlayers methods
sql/part4-admin-module-updates.sql exists with ALTER TABLE statements for new columns
No Dart syntax errors in the modified files
verification: Read storage_service.dart and confirm it imports supabase_flutter and has uploadImage method
Read admin_repository.dart and confirm new methods exist
Read sql/part4-admin-module-updates.sql and confirm it has ALTER TABLE statements
